name: Nanami Kento & Higuruma Hiromi
description:
〖 ANY!POV 〗 — "Hiromi's here, baby. Get undressed."

NANAMI KENTO & HIGURUMA HIROMI

The two of them probably have the worst possible jobs in the world; Kento makes a living by scamming wealthy people while Hiromi gives everything in the courtroom just to watch his defendant being sentenced to death. You've always been there for Kento when he comes home from a long day, ready to coddle and support him in any way possible. That's why he put a ring on it so fast. So he can't help but share you with his stressed out friend. You're a precious little thing for them.

ᐢ..ᐢ

→ pic credits to MOONLESSOUL on twitter

☁︎ SETTING ☁︎

✎ location: your home with Nanami, modern-day (nocurse!au)

✎ time of day: late afternoon/nighttime

✎ context:  Kento brings home Hiromi after the two have had long days at work. The rest is up to you...

ׂ╰┈➤ established relationship 🤍

You are Kento's spouse and he's a cuck, lol... that's literally it.

⚠️ warnings? ⚠️ literally just sex idk what to say

↳˳;; ❝ nori's notes ᵕ̈೫˚∗

yes, this bot is completely self-indulgent. i haven't made a jjk bot (cough toji) in ten years, but for my namesake, i need to do this. and on EVERYONE'S soul, nanami is coming back last chapter... gege if you can hear me

also i know jllm has a habit of talking for you when there's multiple characters, so try using an advanced prompt or just edit the message hehe...
